overall.description: A smooth aerial drone shot gliding through a flooded urban park in a high-fidelity game engine environment. The camera moves past modern office towers and lush green trees reflecting in calm flood waters under bright midday sunlight, revealing the serene post-disaster atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban park facing office district

agents.ego_description: flying drone steadily forward over calm flood waters toward distant office buildings

entered.detail: cluster of tall brutalist concrete office towers with flat roofs
continuous line of mature deciduous trees growing along the water's edge
submerged parking lot or plaza with visible pavement texture beneath shallow water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide view of a flooded urban park, the camera drifting forward over still water that reflects the bright sky. Modern office towers dominate the right horizon while a dense tree line stretches across the center distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded park transitioning to institutional area

events.description: modern office towers exit frame right as white institutional building emerges on left

agents.ego_description: continuing forward flight while panning left to reveal the white building complex

entered.detail: low-rise modern building with white facade and multiple windows, partially obscured by trees
dense coniferous tree line forming the distant background

segments.scene_description: As the office towers recede from view, a white institutional building emerges on the left, nestled among mature trees. The camera continues its smooth forward motion across the flooded plaza, revealing more of the park's extent and distant forested areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: open flooded park with scattered trees

events.description: camera begins gentle left turn revealing open park area and distant brown structure

agents.ego_description: flying forward while turning left to survey the open park area

entered.detail: small rectangular brown structure with flat roof in the distance
dense evergreen forest forming the horizon line
faded blue painted lines visible on submerged asphalt surface

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a more open area of the flooded park as the white building passes from view. A low brown structure and dense coniferous forest appear in the distance on the left, while faded blue road markings become visible on the submerged pavement below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide across a flooded urban park that shifts from a skyline of modern towers to a more secluded, forested landscape. It begins by drifting over still, reflective waters with towering office buildings dominating the right horizon and a dense tree line in the distance. As the towers recede, the camera moves forward to reveal a white institutional building nestled among mature trees on the left, expanding the view across the submerged plaza. The scene then opens further as the white building passes from view, shifting toward a distant brown structure and a dense coniferous forest. Finally, the camera glides over submerged pavement where faded blue road markings become visible beneath the clear floodwaters.
